Title: sha1_digest
Description: returns string containing sha1 digest encoded in base64
Returns string containing sha1 digest encoded in base64. This function has an alias: xenc_sha1_digest ().
Examples:
SQL> select sha1_digest('demodemo');
callret
VARCHAR
WGPZ5MvfUi6qYuB0f86xxbJJuhM=
1 Rows. -- 25 msec.
